nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. Low around 40, with temperatures rising to around 47 overnight. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 54 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 4am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Northeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 10am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a high near 41. Northeast wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 38. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Friday Night
